title: [spec-compliance] Uninitialized vars and parser bugs in EdhocResponder::process_message_1
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:1100-1123: c_i/g_x uninitialized in process_message_1, scoping errors vs Python and RFC 9528 §3.3. Breaks EDHOC handshake per spec/06-security.md:324-335. Recent fixes insufficient. See ses_07076286effeyM9Bu5Zr6pa6rl
